history.author: Prof Aneel Bhangu
history.notes: Initial MVP prompt. Six tiers. Basic deflection logic.

history.author: Prof Aneel Bhangu
history.notes: Full rebuild per Analyst Brief v2.1. Seven tiers including 2WW_URGENT_STT. STT eligibility gate. MCD/ctDNA escalation. Revised safety netting guidance.

history.author: Prof Aneel Bhangu
history.notes: Prompt fix: FIT-negative deflection rule strengthened. Added explicit rule that FIT negative + no hard flags = SAFETY_NET_PASSIVE or REASSURE_DISCHARGE, not Safety Net Active. Absent prior colonoscopy/CT documentation must not upgrade a FIT-negative patient. Added tier selection guide to resolve boundary cases. Regression: cases 2 and 4 (FIT negative, under 60, single symptom) were returning Safety Net Active incorrectly.
history.clinical_signoff: PENDING — requires Prof Aneel Bhangu sign-off before live use
